programs.title: Interview With the Vampire
programs.desc: The vampire family plans to leave town after a big Mardi Gras ball; Claudia and Louis operate outside of Lestat's knowledge; in Dubai, Louis reveals a new element to the interview that changes everything.

programs.title: Boys from County Hell
programs.desc: Some hardy road workers, led by a bickering father and son, must survive the night when they accidentally awaken an ancient Irish vampire.

programs.title: Vampires
programs.desc: Belgian filmmakers chronicle the nightly lives of a vampire (Carlo Ferrante), his wife (Vera Van Dooren) and their children.

programs.title: A Discovery of Witches
programs.desc: In Oxford's library, American historian and reluctant witch Diana Bishop unwittingly calls up an ancient magical manuscript, and finds herself confronted by geneticist and vampire Matthew Clairmont, who is determined to get his hands on the book.

programs.title: A Discovery of Witches
programs.desc: Blind to the interest she has stirred amongst creatures, Diana fights an increasing pull towards the magical and turns her back on her witch heritage; matters take an unexpectedly dark turn when Satu is sent by Peter Knox to intimidate her.

programs.title: A Discovery of Witches
programs.desc: Domenico takes Satu's information to menacing vampire Gerbert, who gains the advantage he has been waiting for; Diana refuses to help Knox realize his longing to destroy the vampires and answers his threats with a force of untamed elemental power.
